no-restricted-syntax.message: Action UI must use the primary-* palette, not blue-* (client/src/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md). Semantic info surfaces (bg-blue-50 banners, text-blue-* info icons) are exempt by design.
Action UI must use the primary-* palette, not blue-* (client/src/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md).

forbid.message: Use the shared Button component (components/ui/Button) instead of a raw <button> — see client/src/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md. Icon-only buttons pending a Button size='icon' variant are tolerated as warnings.
